title: ObjectDifferences
description: ObjectDifferences: Represents all the differences found between a Previous and Following version of an object.

Differences.description: List of all the differences found between the `past` and `following` versions of the object (under a given ComparisonConfig).

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
